source_request: Plan GitHub issue #4 in /Users/brian/dev/github/kontourai/kontour-console: Define Kontour emitter, sink, and plane contracts.

criteria.description: Docs define control-plane vs telemetry-plane data types and authority boundaries.
criteria.notes: PASS evidence: docs/specs/emitter-sink-plane-contract.md:22-47 defines control-plane and telemetry-plane records, shared correlation, and authority limits for Surface, Flow, Survey, Veritas, Flow Agents, vertical products, and Kontour Console.

criteria.description: Docs define `KontourEmitter`, `LocalFileSink`, `CompositeSink`, future `HttpApiSink`, and future telemetry/Otel sink roles.
criteria.notes: PASS evidence: docs/specs/emitter-sink-plane-contract.md:58-68 defines KontourEmitter, LocalFileSink, CompositeSink, future HttpApiSink, and future telemetry/Otel sink as contract roles without implementation.

criteria.description: Docs define multi-output fanout with stable event/projection ids and independent per-sink results.
criteria.notes: PASS evidence: docs/specs/emitter-sink-plane-contract.md:48-56, 78-88, and 90-115 preserve one semantic source record/id across sinks and define independent per-sink outcomes.

criteria.description: Docs define local-first fallback and at-least-once/dedupe semantics.
criteria.notes: PASS evidence: docs/specs/emitter-sink-plane-contract.md:70-76 and 117-131 require local-first output, separate local/network results, define at-least-once delivery, and require dedupe by stable semantic identity; docs/specs/projection-schema.md:65-72 and 282-289 align replay/idempotency semantics.

criteria.description: Docs explicitly state no generic sink executes action descriptors, opens URLs, or mutates product state.
criteria.notes: PASS evidence: docs/specs/emitter-sink-plane-contract.md:133-149 prohibits generic sinks from executing descriptors, opening URLs, calling endpoints, running commands, fetching backend resources, mutating product state, or trusting record-provided paths; docs/specs/projection-schema.md:543-545 aligns action authority fields as descriptors only.

goal_fit.summary: Issue #4 implementation satisfies the docs-only user outcome: the emitter/sink/plane contract is documented, discoverable, local-first, transport-neutral, idempotent/replay-aware, and explicit that generic sinks never execute action descriptors.
